film.title: Abhimaan
film.overview: A popular singer encourages his wife to sing, but tensions mount between the pair when his career begins to falter and her own musical career and popularity surpasses his own.

dialogues.dialogue: Aunty come inside. Freshen up a bit first. No, I won't even touch the water of this house. I just came to say that...... as much as I was proud of him once, I'm ashamed of him as much now. Can a human being stoop so low? Ask him to go and see...... the plight of such a delicate girl. She'd better die rather then live like this.
dialogues.cause_raw: causing harm to a delicate girl

dialogues.dialogue: Yes Chitra, all of us are alone. We are to blame ourselves for this loneliness. We create it with our false pride and ego. Now I like my loneliness. - You like it! - Yes.

Aunty come inside. Freshen up a bit first. No, I won't even touch the water of this house. I just came to say that...... as much as I was proud of him once, I'm ashamed of him as much now. Can a human being stoop so low? Ask him to go and see...... the plight of such a delicate girl. She'd better die rather then live like this.
